data.body: AC5 GAP CLOSED (caught by the completion-verification close gate): implemented project tree-sitter custom-grammar support — engine_b._resolve_astgrep_sgconfig reads .rebar/sgconfig.yml (or .rebar/grounding.toml astgrep_sgconfig), threads it to ast-grep via --config so customLanguages grammars load, and routes custom-language detectors as applicable when their extensions are present; unconfigured language fails open (skipped+coverage). +2 regression tests. commit follows.
